Label5.name: Label5
Label5.label: *To view the properties for a role, double-click on it from the grid. To filter the grid by active or inactive roles, input either 0 (for inactive) or 1 (for active)—not true or false.

Label1.name: Label1
Label1.label: *To view the properties for a user, double-click on it from the grid. To filter the grid by active or inactive users, input either 0 (for inactive) or 1 (for active)—not true or false.

RayAutoCompleteDropDownList12.label: Member
RayAutoCompleteDropDownList12.tooltip: A member can either be a role or a user, depending on the group type

faSignature.name: faSignature
